MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Settlement Conference this day.
Commissioner: Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: Sajja Ravinantapricha, CSR: Mitch Lyon.
Appearances: Michael Carrington, Esq. represented the Plaintiff, McAllister Street Assoc. California Ltd. present by James Holland the property manager.
Defendant, Herman Ledbetter was late, present in pro per.
Matter was not settled and off the Settlement Conference calendar. Trial date confirmed.
